name: RC Low-Pass Filter
description: First-order RC low-pass filter. Passes frequencies below fc, attenuates above. fc = 1/(2πRC). At fc: output is −3dB (70.7% of input). Roll-off: −20dB/decade above fc.
notes: fc = 1/(2π×R1×C1). R1=10kΩ, C1=10nF: fc ≈ 1.59kHz. Above fc, output rolls off at −20dB/decade. Used for audio filtering, noise reduction, anti-aliasing before ADC. Input impedance = R1. Output should drive high-impedance load.

components.notes: Shunt capacitor — low impedance at HF
